# Black Diamond Cleaning Solutions LLC
> Premium house cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in/move-out, recurring, and commercial cleaning serving Pennsylvania and New York. 4.9★ on Google with 500+ homes cleaned.

## Contact
- Phone: (215) 650-3101
- Email: info@blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8:00 AM–6:00 PM; Sat 9:00 AM–4:00 PM; Sun closed
- Website: https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com

## Services
- [Standard Cleaning](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/standard-cleaning): Consistent whole-home cleaning for everyday freshness.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/deep-cleaning): Top-to-bottom intensive cleaning — 15% off your first deep clean.
- [Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/move-in-move-out-cleaning): Transition-ready cleaning for renters, buyers, and landlords.
- [Recurring Cleaning](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/recurring-cleaning): Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly plans at a discounted rate.
- [Commercial Cleaning](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/services/commercial-cleaning): Small-office and small-commercial cleaning with after-hours availability.

## Service Areas
- [State College, PA](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/state-college-pa): Centre County and Penn State area.
- [Scranton, PA](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/scranton-pa): Scranton and Lackawanna County homes and Airbnbs.
- [Altoona, PA](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/altoona-pa): Altoona and Blair County residential and commercial.
- [Harrisburg, PA](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/harrisburg-pa): Pennsylvania capital region and Dauphin County.
- [Williamsport, PA](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/williamsport-pa): Williamsport and Lycoming County, including historic homes.
- [Erie, PA](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/erie-pa): Erie and Erie County including lakeside homes.
- [Buffalo, NY](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/buffalo-ny): Buffalo metro and Erie County, NY.
- [Rochester, NY](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/rochester-ny): Rochester and Monroe County homes and small businesses.
- [Syracuse, NY](https://blackdiamondcleaningsolutionsllc.com/service-areas/syracuse-ny): Syracuse and Central NY, including SU-area rentals.
